steps.title: Highlight Costa's gold count
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the number of gold medals Rafael Costa won. The notes state that Costa won thirty-eight total medals and that twenty-five of them were gold, so the best choice must foreground that gold-medal count.

steps.title: Reject missing counts
steps.content: B calls Costa a multiple gold medalist but omits the number. C discusses gold medals generally and focuses on Luca Meier. D gives Costa's total medals but leaves out how many were gold. The answer is A.
